evals.expected_output: Markdown report with themes discovered from 15 issues, prioritization scores, demand trends, and recommended actions

assertions.text: A markdown report file was created
Report contains Executive Summary with total issues, theme count, top themes
All 15 issues appear in at least one theme
Each theme has a numerical priority score, ranked
At least one theme shows per-dimension score breakdown
Each theme has a recommended action
Report includes demand trends or age analysis

evals.prompt: What are users asking for most in hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws?
evals.expected_output: Markdown report with themes from 500 issues, adaptive scoring with differentiated scores, demand trends

assertions.text: A markdown report file was created
Report contains Executive Summary with total issues, theme count, top themes
Priority scores span at least 2.0 range across themes
Each theme has a numerical priority score, ranked
At least one theme shows per-dimension breakdown
Each theme has a recommended action
Report includes reaction counts or most-reacted issues
Report includes demand trends or age analysis
Key issues linked with GitHub URLs
